raw.subject: Your Bridgeport page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Pet owners clearly adore their pets, and they want the best for them. Your business, Loving and Care Pet Grooming, has a unique rapport with pet owners in Bridgeport. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for people to find and book your services.

I sketched a page idea that highlights your grooming services and showcases your adorable pets through a photo gallery from your Facebook posts. It also includes a clear call-to-action for bookings.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/loving-and-care-pet-grooming-bridgeport

Let's discuss how a simple website can help your business thrive. I work with local businesses on a flat fee basis, no surprises.
